content.speakerText: I'm new here—how do I make copies? I'm not sure how to use this machine.
content.speakerTextCn: 我是新人，怎么复印啊？我不太会用这台机器。

options.text: Just press the big green button first.
You should call the IT department for help.
Read the manual carefully before using it.
You need to log in with your employee ID first.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Just press the big green button first.' 是直接、具体的动作指导，符合场景中‘用具体动作词引导’的要求。其他选项虽然语法正确，但过于抽象或不切实际，不符合快速指导新人使用设备的语境。

content.speakerText: Can I set it to double-sided? I need to save paper.
content.speakerTextCn: 能设成双面复印吗？我想省纸。

options.text: Yep, just tap 'Duplex' on the screen.
I don't think this machine supports double-sided.
You can try, but it might jam the paper.
You need to ask the manager for permission.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Yep, just tap 'Duplex' on the screen.' 是积极肯定的回应，符合‘优先用肯定句增强信心’的要求。其他选项要么否定功能、制造焦虑，要么引入不必要的流程，不符合高效指导的原则。

content.speakerText: How do I change the paper size? The machine is printing too small.
content.speakerTextCn: 怎么改纸张大小？机器打印出来的太小了。

options.text: Go to the settings menu and select 'Paper Size' then choose A4 or Letter.
Just turn it off and on again—that usually fixes everything.
You need to buy new paper that's bigger.

content.explanation: 正确答案提供清晰、具体的操作步骤，符合场景中‘指导操作’的核心目标。其他选项要么是无效的万能解决方案，要么错误地归因于硬件问题，缺乏实用指导价值。

content.template: You just put the paper in and hit ___—super easy!
content.hint: 这是复印机上最常用的按钮名称
content.knowledgePoint: 场景高频词汇（复印功能动词）

content.template: Just tap '___' on the screen to print double-sided.
content.hint: 这是复印机屏幕上表示双面打印的英文术语
content.knowledgePoint: 场景核心术语（双面打印的专业词汇）

content.hint: 这是表达‘我来教你’的常用口语表达
content.knowledgePoint: 场景功能表达（提供帮助的惯用搭配）

content.speakerText: I'm new here—how do I make copies? I'm not sure how to use this machine.
content.speakerTextCn: 我是新人，怎么复印啊？我不太会用这台机器。
expectedAnswers: No problem! Just press the big green button first.
I'll show you—put your paper in, then hit 'Copy' and it's done.
Don't worry, it's super simple: load the paper and press the green button.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确指导了第一步操作
语言准确性：是否使用了正确的动词和术语（如 press, hit, copy）
表达自然度：是否使用了口语化表达（如 'No problem!', 'super easy'）
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'press', 'button', 'copy' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: Can I set it to double-sided? I need to save paper.
content.speakerTextCn: 能设成双面复印吗？我想省纸。
expectedAnswers: Yep, just tap 'Duplex' on the screen.
Absolutely! Look for the icon with two pages—it's right next to the color settings.
Yes, you can! Select 'Duplex' from the menu and it'll print on both sides automatically.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确确认功能可用并提供操作路径
语言准确性：是否正确使用 'Duplex' 和 'tap/select' 等术语
表达自然度：是否使用了鼓励性语气（如 'Yep', 'Absolutely'）
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'Duplex', 'screen', 'icon', 'double-sided' 等关键词

content.speakerText: The copies are coming out too light—how do I adjust the darkness?
content.speakerTextCn: 复印出来的字太淡了，怎么调深一点？
expectedAnswers: Go to the 'Density' setting and turn it up a bit.
Just press the 'Darkness' button on the control panel—it's the one with the shade icon.
You can increase the contrast in the menu; try setting it to 'Medium' or 'Dark'.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否准确回应了调整浓度的需求
语言准确性：是否使用了正确术语（如 'Density', 'Darkness', 'contrast'）
表达自然度：是否使用了具体操作指引而非模糊描述
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'density', 'darkness', 'setting', 'menu' 等关键词
